qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: Consider the following C code segment. int a, b, c = 0; void prtFun(void); main() { static int a = 1; /* Line 1 */ prtFun(); a += 1; prtFun(); printf(" \n %d %d ", a, b); }

qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: Suppose and are unsigned int variables in a C program. We wish to set to . If is large, which one of the following statements is most likely to set correctly? A. B. C. D.
